ov_overview_body.en: Movie Park Germany is Germany's largest film and entertainment theme park — a spectacular 40-hectare Hollywood experience located in Bottrop-Kirchhellen in the heart of the Ruhr region, North Rhine-Westphalia, just 50 kilometres north of Dusseldorf. Originally opened in 1967 as a modest fairy tale park and transformed over decades into the blockbuster destination it is today, Movie Park Germany opened its current incarnation in 1996 with Warner Bros. branding before evolving into the diverse film and entertainment park it has become. Today the park features over 40 attractions and experiences across 7 immersive themed areas, combining blockbuster roller coasters with beloved film franchises and live entertainment. The crown jewel is Star Trek: Operation Enterprise — the world's first and only Star Trek licensed roller coaster, a powerful Mack Rides multi-launch coaster that opened in 2017 as the most ambitious attraction in the park's history. Van Helsing's Factory is the beloved indoor dark ride coaster that combines atmospheric steampunk theming with genuine speed and surprises. The High Fall is a tilting Gyro Drop tower reaching 60 metres. The park is open from late March through early November with a spectacular Hollywood Christmas season from late November through January. No on-site hotel exists at Movie Park Germany — partner hotels in Gladbeck, Gelsenkirchen and Dorsten provide the best accommodation options.
ov_overview_body.es: Movie Park Germany es el parque tematico de cine y entretenimiento mas grande de Alemania — 40 hectareas de experiencia Hollywood en Bottrop-Kirchhellen en el corazon de la region del Ruhr a 50 km al norte de Dusseldorf. Con mas de 40 atracciones Star Trek: Operation Enterprise es el primer y unico coaster con licencia Star Trek del mundo. Van Helsing's Factory es la amada dark ride coaster de interior. The High Fall es una torre inclinable de 60 metros. El parque esta abierto desde finales de marzo hasta principios de noviembre.

The High Fall est une tour inclinable de 60 metres. Le parc est ouvert de fin mars a debut novembre.

ov_overview_body.pt: Movie Park Germany e o maior parque tematico de cinema e entretenimento da Alemanha — 40 hectares de experiencia Hollywood em Bottrop-Kirchhellen no coracao da regiao do Ruhr a 50 km a norte de Dusseldorf. ov_overview_body.ru: Movie Park Germany — крупнейший кинематографический и развлекательный тематический парк Германии — 40 гектаров голливудских впечатлений в Боттроп-Кирххеллене в сердце Рурской области в 50 км к северу от Дюссельдорфа. Из более чем 40 аттракционов Star Trek: Operation Enterprise — первый и единственный в мире коастер с лицензией Star Trek. Van Helsing's Factory — любимый закрытый тёмный аттракцион-горки. The High Fall — наклонная Gyro Drop башня высотой 60 метров. Парк открыт с конца марта по начало ноября.
ov_overview_body.zh: Movie Park德国是德国最大的电影娱乐主题公园——位于北莱茵-威斯特法伦州鲁尔区心脏地带波特罗普-基尔赫海伦的40公顷好莱坞体验，距杜塞尔多夫以北50公里。拥有40多个景点，星际迷航：进取号行动是世界上第一个也是唯一一个星际迷航授权过山车。吸血鬼猎人工厂是深受喜爱的室内暗室游乐过山车。高落是一座60米高的倾斜陀螺落塔。公园从三月底开放至十一月初。
ov_overview_body.ar: Movie Park Germany هو اكبر متنزه ترفيهي سينمائي في المانيا — 40 هكتارا من تجربة هوليوود في Bottrop-Kirchhellen في قلب منطقة الرور على بعد 50 كم شمال دوسلدورف. مع اكثر من 40 جاذبية Star Trek: Operation Enterprise هو اول وحيد اوتوستراد برخصة Star Trek في العالم. Van Helsing's Factory هو اوتوستراد Dark Ride الداخلي المحبوب. The High Fall برج Gyro Drop مائل بارتفاع 60 مترا. المتنزه مفتوح من اواخر مارس الى مطلع نوفمبر.

ov_highlights_body.en: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise is the world's only Star Trek coaster — Mack Rides multi-launch with authentic franchise theming and IMAscore soundtrack. Van Helsing's Factory is the most popular indoor coaster in the park — steampunk vampire atmosphere with genuine dark ride thrills. The High Fall tilts riders outward at 60 metres before freefall — the most dramatic drop tower experience in the Ruhr. Movie Park Studio Tour is the park's newest coaster housed in the former Ice Age building celebrating the park's 25th anniversary. Mystery River has been completely rethemed with new effects and soundtrack. The Nickelodeon Nickland area is the best family zone in the park with Nick Racers racing coaster. The Hollywood Christmas event from late November transforms the park into a spectacular winter wonderland.

Van Helsing's Factory es el coaster interior mas popular con atmosfera vampirica steampunk. The High Fall inclina a los riders a 60 metros antes de la caida libre. Movie Park Studio Tour es el coaster mas nuevo del parque. Mystery River ha sido completamente retematizado. El Nickland de Nickelodeon es la mejor zona familiar.

Movie Park Studio Tour est le plus recent coaster du parc. Mystery River a ete completement retematise. Le Nickland de Nickelodeon est la meilleure zone familiale.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Movie Park Germany's origins stretch back to 1967 when the site operated as the Kirchhellener Marchenwald — a modest fairy tale woodland park. Warner Bros. purchased the location in December 1993 and the grand opening of Warner Bros. Movie World Germany took place on 29 June 1996 with 20,000 invited guests including Michael Douglas, Sophia Loren and Claudia Schiffer. The park was sold to Parques Reunidos in 2010. Bandit, the park's wooden coaster which opened in 1999, was Germany's first modern wooden roller coaster since the 1980s and is based on the design of the legendary Coney Island Cyclone. Star Trek: Operation Enterprise, which opened in 2017, is the world's first and only Star Trek licensed roller coaster — no other park on earth has been granted permission to build a Star Trek themed coaster. The park features no on-site hotel making it unusual among major German theme parks. Movie Park Germany's Hollywood Christmas event runs from late November through January and is one of the most spectacular winter theme park events in Germany.
ov_did_you_know_body.es: Los origenes de Movie Park Germany se remontan a 1967. Warner Bros. compro el parque en diciembre de 1993 y la gran apertura fue el 29 de junio de 1996 con invitados como Michael Douglas y Claudia Schiffer. Bandit inaugurado en 1999 fue la primera montana rusa de madera moderna de Alemania desde los anos 80. Star Trek: Operation Enterprise abierto en 2017 es el unico coaster Star Trek con licencia del mundo.

ov_did_you_know_body.ar: تعود اصول Movie Park Germany الى عام 1967. اشترت Warner Bros. المتنزه في ديسمبر 1993 وكان الافتتاح الكبير في 29 يونيو 1996 مع ضيوف مثل مايكل دوغلاس وكلوديا شيفر. Bandit المفتوح عام 1999 كان اول قطار تلال خشبي حديث في المانيا منذ الثمانينيات. Star Trek: Operation Enterprise المفتوح عام 2017 هو اوتوستراد Star Trek الوحيد المرخص في العالم.

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at opening and go straight to Star Trek: Operation Enterprise — it builds the longest queues fastest. Then Van Helsing's Factory before midday. The High Fall queues are manageable throughout the day. Movie Park Studio Tour is best mid-morning. Mystery River is perfect for a warm afternoon. Spirello near the centre is the best quick snack stop. Van Helsing's Club is the best lunch option — aim for 11:30am to avoid peak rush. Note that Bandit is currently temporarily closed — check the park website for updates before visiting. Nickland is best visited in the afternoon when younger children are most energetic. The Hollywood Stunt Show is a must-see — check the daily schedule at the entrance for show times. Download the Movie Park app for live wait times. Book tickets online for significant savings.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve directamente a Star Trek: Operation Enterprise. Luego Van Helsing's Factory antes del mediodia. Movie Park Studio Tour es mejor a media manana. Mystery River es perfecta para una tarde calida. Van Helsing's Club es la mejor opcion para almorzar. Nota: Bandit esta temporalmente cerrado. El espectaculo de acrobacias de Hollywood es una visita obligada.
ov_plan_body.fr: Arrivez a l'ouverture et allez directement a Star Trek: Operation Enterprise. Ensuite Van Helsing's Factory avant midi. Movie Park Studio Tour est mieux en milieu de matinee. Mystery River est parfait pour un apres-midi chaud. Van Helsing's Club est la meilleure option pour le dejeuner. Note: Bandit est temporairement ferme. Le Hollywood Stunt Show est incontournable.
ov_plan_body.de: Kommen Sie zur Eroffnung und gehen Sie direkt zu Star Trek: Operation Enterprise. Dann Van Helsing's Factory vor dem Mittag. Movie Park Studio Tour ist am besten am Vormittag. Mystery River ist perfekt fur einen warmen Nachmittag. Van Helsing's Club ist die beste Mittagsoption. Hinweis: Bandit ist derzeit vorubergehend geschlossen. Die Hollywood Stunt Show ist ein Muss.
ov_plan_body.it: Arriva all'apertura e vai direttamente a Star Trek: Operation Enterprise. Poi Van Helsing's Factory prima di mezzogiorno. Movie Park Studio Tour e meglio a meta mattina. ov_plan_body.nl: Kom bij de opening en ga direct naar Star Trek: Operation Enterprise. Dan Van Helsing's Factory voor de middag. Movie Park Studio Tour is het beste in de ochtend. ov_plan_body.ru: Приходите к открытию и сразу идите к Star Trek: Operation Enterprise. Затем Van Helsing's Factory до полудня. Movie Park Studio Tour лучше всего посещать в середине утра. Mystery River идеален для тёплого послеполудня. Van Helsing's Club — лучший вариант для обеда. Примечание: Bandit временно закрыт. Голливудское трюковое шоу обязательно к просмотру.
ov_plan_body.zh: 在开园时到达，直奔星际迷航：进取号行动。然后在中午前体验吸血鬼猎人工厂。Movie Park工作室之旅最好在上午中段体验。神秘河非常适合温暖的下午。吸血鬼猎人俱乐部是最好的午餐选择。注意：强盗目前临时关闭。好莱坞特技表演是必看节目。
ov_plan_body.ar: وصل عند الفتح وتوجه مباشرة الى Star Trek: Operation Enterprise. ثم Van Helsing's Factory قبل الظهر. Movie Park Studio Tour افضل في منتصف الصباح. Mystery River مثالي لفترة بعد الظهر الدافئة. Van Helsing's Club افضل خيار للغداء. ملاحظة: Bandit مغلق مؤقتا. عرض Hollywood Stunt Show لا يفوت.

ov_photos_body.en: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise photographed at night with its futuristic lighting is one of the most striking theme park images in Germany. Van Helsing's Factory's gothic steampunk exterior is highly photogenic from the park walkways. The High Fall at the moment of freefall release photographed from the viewing area below creates dramatic drop tower imagery. Mystery River's new themed waterway with atmospheric lighting effects makes excellent photography. The Nickland area's bright Nickelodeon colours are perfect for family photography. The Hollywood Christmas decorations transform the entire park into a spectacular golden and festive landscape from late November — one of the most photographable theme park Christmas events in Germany.
ov_photos_body.es: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise fotografiado de noche con su iluminacion futurista es una de las imagenes mas impactantes de parques tematicos en Alemania. El exterior gotico steampunk de Van Helsing's Factory es muy fotogenico. The High Fall en el momento de la caida libre crea imagenes dramaticas. Las decoraciones navidenas de Hollywood transforman el parque en un espectacular paisaje festivo.
ov_photos_body.fr: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise photographie la nuit avec son eclairage futuriste est l'une des images de parc a theme les plus frappantes d'Allemagne. Les decorations de Noel Hollywood transforment le parc en un spectaculaire paysage festif.

ov_photos_body.it: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise fotografato di notte con la sua illuminazione futuristica e una delle immagini di parchi a tema piu sorprendenti in Germania. L'esterno gotico steampunk di Van Helsing's Factory e molto fotografabile. The High Fall al momento della caduta libera crea immagini drammatiche. Le decorazioni natalizie Hollywood trasformano il parco in uno spettacolare paesaggio festivo.
ov_photos_body.nl: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise 's nachts gefotografeerd met futuristische verlichting is een van de meest opvallende attractieparkbeelden in Duitsland. Van Helsing's Factory's gotisch steampunk exterieur is zeer fotogeniek. The High Fall op het moment van de vrije val creert dramatische beelden. De Hollywood kerstdecoraties transformeren het park in een spectaculair feestelijk landschap.
ov_photos_body.pt: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise fotografado a noite com iluminacao futurista e uma das imagens de parques tematicos mais marcantes da Alemanha. O exterior gotico steampunk de Van Helsing's Factory e muito fotogenico. The High Fall no momento da queda livre cria imagens dramaticas. As decoracoes de Natal Hollywood transformam o parque num espetacular cenario festivo.
ov_photos_body.ru: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise, сфотографированный ночью с футуристической подсветкой — один из самых впечатляющих образов тематических парков Германии. Готический стимпанк-экстерьер Van Helsing's Factory очень фотогеничен. The High Fall в момент свободного падения создаёт драматические снимки. Рождественские украшения Hollywood превращают парк в зрелищный праздничный пейзаж.
ov_photos_body.zh: 夜间拍摄的星际迷航：进取号行动配上未来主义灯光是德国最引人注目的主题公园图像之一。吸血鬼猎人工厂的哥特蒸汽朋克外观非常上镜。高落在自由落体瞬间的照片创造出戏剧性的落塔图像。好莱坞圣诞节装饰将公园从十一月底变成壮观的节日景观。
ov_photos_body.ar: Star Trek: Operation Enterprise الملتقط ليلا مع الاضاءة المستقبلية هو واحد من اكثر صور متنزهات الترفيه لفتا للنظر في المانيا. الواجهة الخارجية القوطية الستيمبنك لـ Van Helsing's Factory مصورة بشكل جميل. The High Fall في لحظة السقوط الحر يخلق صورا درامية. تحويل ديكور عيد الميلاد Hollywood المتنزه الى مشهد احتفالي رائع.
